calendar.matters:
Petition To Exonerate Bond
Off Calendar May-14-2024 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Appointing New Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jul-28-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Hilary Lamar for (proposed successor trustee) Barbara Simon.

The Court stated that this is a petition to appoint a successor trustee, that there are a few issues such as the misspelling of the name, that the proof of service does not state that the notice was served and that there is an issue of the bond amount. The Court stated that it was willing to overlook the misspelling of the name. Ms. Lamar responded that notice was sent and that they e-filed an amended notice last night, that the paralegal had used the wrong back page of the form, confirmed that bond should be the greater amount and that they had found later that it was too low and assumed that the Court would correct it. The Court took the Petition for Order Appointing New Successor trustee under submission to confirm the filing of the notice and then expects to grant the petition with a bond amount of $721,000.00.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Appointing New Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-21-2016 Continued To Jul-20-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
